patch.value:
## Context
Annotation facets share runAnnotationCommand (src/cli/commands/annotation-command.ts) but only comments.ts wires edit/delete and multiple input sources. notes.ts and learnings.ts expose add-only. Any mistaken note/learning (e.g. the pm-vcu7 flag-swallow) is permanent via the CLI; fixing it needs manual storage surgery plus history re-anchor, which no agent should do.

## Approach
Extend the shared annotation-command machinery so edit/delete are facet-generic (comments' implementation likely already is); wire the options in notes.ts/learnings.ts; align input-source flags. Coordinate with pm-yql1 (facet grammar consolidation) so the unified facet noun exposes the same verbs — implementing this first gives yql1 a uniform surface to consolidate.

## Definition of done
Bad entries on any annotation facet are correctable with pm CLI only, with history recorded.
Notes/learnings repair parity: add --edit/--delete (and a real --stdin/--file input source) matching comments, so bad annotation entries are fixable via the CLI

Comments support --edit <index>/--delete <index> plus [text]/--add/--stdin/--file input sources; notes and learnings are append-only with only --add (stdin via '--add -'). Audit #11 hit this live: a bogus note ('--stdin', see pm-vcu7) on milestone pm-doxj could not be corrected by any pm command and required manual .toon + history revert — violating the philosophy that agents rebuild and maintain full context via the pm CLI alone. Duplicate check 2026-07-06: pm-yql1 consolidates facet GRAMMAR (zero feature loss, no new verbs); pm-9y8q (closed) deduped internals; no open item adds edit/delete to notes/learnings.

pm notes/learnings support --edit <index> and --delete <index> with 1-based indexing, history ops, and ownership/audit-bypass semantics identical to comments; input sources aligned (--stdin/--file or documented '--add -' everywhere consistently); contracts + MCP schema + completion + docs updated per the new-command-wiring checklist; regression tests for edit/delete on both facets

value.note: shared machinery to make edit/delete facet-generic
reference implementation: edit/delete + stdin/file input sources
